Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

must_detect.matched_text: Issuer: Northlake Health Systems, Inc. (CRX: NLHS) and Acquirer: BlueBend Bancorp, N.A., for the acquisition of Juniper TeleCare LLC.
Structure: stock-and-cash merger; 62.5% cash, 37.5% stock; enterprise value approximately $275,000,000.
Financing: BlueBend to provide $120,000,000 senior secured term loan B; remainder from NLHS cash and revolver draw; commitment letter attached.

Confidential—Non-Public; subject to Reg FD; Project ORCHID Board Term Sheet (draft).
Issuer: Northlake Health Systems, Inc. (CRX: NLHS) and Acquirer: BlueBend Bancorp, N.A., for the acquisition of Juniper TeleCare LLC.
Structure: stock-and-cash merger; 62.5% cash, 37.5% stock; enterprise value approximately $275,000,000.
Consideration: $14.25 per common unit equivalent, subject to customary purchase price adjustments and working capital true-up.
Financing: BlueBend to provide $120,000,000 senior secured term loan B; remainder from NLHS cash and revolver draw; commitment letter attached.
Signing: definitive Merger Agreement targeted on or before 2026-07-12; closing expected Q4 2026, subject to HSR and state banking/healthcare approvals.
Embargo: no external communications or selective disclosure until 2026-07-15 08:30 ET; current report on Form 8-K and press release to post simultaneously.
MAC/MAE: no Company Material Adverse Effect shall be deemed to have occurred due solely to industry-wide reimbursement changes, changes in law, or pandemics disclosed prior to Signing.
Covenants: ordinary-course operations; no dividends, equity issuance >$5,000,000, or new clinic openings without written Acquirer consent.
Diligence: verify HIPAA de-identification, GLBA safeguarding for patient-finance modules, and auditor comfort letter for pro formas.
IR draft note (not for distribution): management preliminarily models high-single-digit EPS accretion in year one; subject to integration risks.
public reference: the 2021 state health report (publicly available) shows telehealth adoption at ~28%, which may be stale and is not a deal trigger.
Contacts: Ms. Rina Palley, CFO, rina.palley@northlakehealth.test; Mr. Theo Marr, Managing Director, theo.marr@bluebendbancorp.test; deal room orchid@secure-rooms.test.
Disclosure controls: do not share with sell-side analysts or lenders beyond wall-crossed parties until the embargo lifts and the 8-K posts.
